input.topic: BianLian Ransomware Extortion Campaign Targeting Critical Infrastructure 2022-2024
input.notes: BianLian ransomware group conducting double-extortion campaign against critical infrastructure and private sector organizations across Australia, North America, and the UK. Joint advisory AA23-136A by CISA, FBI, and ACSC/ASD (Australia). Active 2022-2024. The group pivoted from encrypt-then-extort to primarily exfiltration-only extortion after a decryptor was released publicly. Targets include healthcare, critical manufacturing, professional services, and media sectors. Distinct from existing corpus entries (LockBit, BlackCat, etc.) — BianLian has distinctive tradecraft including Go-based backdoor and custom exfiltration tooling. Conservative scope: bounded to the 2022-2024 campaign covered in the joint advisory.
